name: recoil_app_init_std_log_files
description: RecoilApp::InitStdLogFiles clears the main window handle, redirects stderr/stdout to executable-derived .err/.out log files, writes the startup header, and falls back to gamez.err/gamez.out in the temp directory when direct open fails.
known_limits: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare fails with 347 unmasked mismatches after masking 96 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 499 bytes and the VC object body is 496 bytes with 13 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.

The byte drift is in compiler inline string-copy/string-concat code shape, register allocation, and stdio import call sequencing; Binary Ninja notes this as an MSVC inline strcpy/strcat reconstruction limitation.
The native smoke verifies the null-path guard clears g_RecoilApp_hWndMain, then calls the helper with a temp filename stem and checks that .err and .out files are created with the startup header.
